title: Perave system
content:

The '''Perave system''', also known as the '''Arkania system''',<ref name="TNJOS">''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]''</ref> and as the '''Arkanian system''',<ref name="TLJ">[[The Last Jedi (novel)|''The Last Jedi'']]</ref> was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] which contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]]. It was centered around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Olim]].

{{System-stub}}
